zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Vesey於1490年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir Charles Arthur de Vesey51歲，母親Lady Agnes of Beddingfield Warren42歲。他於1516年與Katherine Forth在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國素福爾可哈德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Vesey于1490年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir Charles Arthur de Vesey51岁，母亲Lady Agnes of Beddingfield Warren42岁。他于1516年与Katherine Forth在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国素福爾可哈德利。

nameMeanings.name: Vesey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Veazey
meanings: English (Rutland): nickname from Anglo-Norman French enveisé ‘playful’ (Old French envoisié), Latinized as invesiatus (compare medieval Latin invasus ‘possessed by a demon’) and paralleled by lascivus ‘wanton’. The first syllable was lost early, resulting in numerous dialectal and orthographic variants; only Lenfestey preserves the fuller form, with an intrusive medial -t-. There has also been some confusion with Vessey .
History: John Veazey came from England to MD in the late 17th century. Thomas Ward Veazey (born 1774) was a MD legislator and planter.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Vesey was born in 1490, in England, his father, Sir Charles Arthur de Vesey, was 51 and his mother, Lady Agnes of Beddingfield Warren, was 42. He married Katherine Forth in 1516, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He was buried in Hadleigh, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Vesey est né en 1490, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Charles Arthur de Vesey, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes of Beddingfield Warren, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Forth en 1516, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Ilenterré à Hadleigh, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Vesey 1490 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Charles Arthur de Vesey 51 und seine Mutter Lady Agnes of Beddingfield Warren 42. Er hat 1516 in England Katherine Forth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er wurde in Hadleigh, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Vesey è nato il nel 1490 nel England, il suo padre, Sir Charles Arthur de Vesey, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agnes of Beddingfield Warren, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Forth nel 1516, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Fu sepolto a Hadleigh, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Veseyが1490年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Charles Arthur de Veseyは51歳，母Lady Agnes of Beddingfield Warrenは42歳であった。1516年にイギリスでKatherine Forthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリススフォルクハドレイグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Vesey(이)가 1490년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Charles Arthur de Vesey(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agnes of Beddingfield Warren(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1516년 영국에서 Katherine Forth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 수폴크 하들리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Vesey nasceu em 1490, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Charles Arthur de Vesey, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes of Beddingfield Warren, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Forth em 1516, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele foi sepultado em Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Vesey родился в 1490 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Charles Arthur de Vesey было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes of Beddingfield Warren, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Forth в 1516 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он был похоронен в местности хадлиг, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Vesey nació en 1490, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Charles Arthur de Vesey, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes of Beddingfield Warren, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Katherine Forth en 1516, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Fue sepultado en Hadleigh, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
